alt_text: A hierarchical box diagram. The outermost yellow frame is labeled '1 مور (سلطان)' (1 Mor / Sultan). Inside it are four orange 'کور' (Kor) boxes, each labeled 100,000. Inside each Kor box are four red 'دور' (Dor) boxes, each labeled 100,000. The nested structure depicts how 1 Mor contains multiple Kors which in turn contain multiple Dors.
notes: Pairs with image 012 to formalize the Mor / Kor / Dor cosmic-time hierarchy. The 100,000 unit appears at each level, suggesting a multiplicative cycle structure (1 Mor encompasses multiple 100,000-Kor cycles, each containing multiple 100,000-Dor sub-cycles). The Sultan epithet on Mor confirms its position as the supreme cycle.
